choose a throne:

Event: Royal Challenge - Season 33
Event Date: 01/01/2025
Sage Bot Item Code: A137
Jade butterfly

Triggers: 3 sec

Launches an orb at a random enemy. The orb bounces up to 2 times. On hit the orb reduces the target’s magic armor by 25% for 5 sec. (Stacks up to 3 times) and deals 250000 magic damage. The orb has a 40% chance to instead cast decay on the target’s armor. When the enemy’s armor is decayed, that enemy takes 250000 pure damage and has their magic armor reduced by 35% for 5 sec. Also, that enemy takes 250000 magic damage over 5 sec.
Once in a while, the unit starts launching anti-magic orbs every 0,5 over 4 sec.

Requirements: 90-100

User rating: item not rated yet

First trigger: 3 sec
